title: EXPRESS CLINIC - 211info
text: THE DALLES EXPRESS CLINIC EXPRESS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides same day and scheduled immediate and acute care, including COVID-19 and flu testing and treatment, sexually transmitted infection (STI) screening and treatment, urinary tract infection (UTI) diagnosis and treatment, minor injuries, and blood pressure checks. 1010 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6 pm, Saturday 8am-3 pm. Closed major holidays. Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Community Clinics COVID-19 Diagnostic Tests COVID-19 Treatment Flu Vaccines Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE DALLES EXPRESS CLINIC
